description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal bucket with a weathered, darkened exterior showing significant signs of rust and wear, suggesting prolonged outdoor or industrial use. The surface is mottled with patches of brownish rust and blackened areas, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. Two robust, rectangular side handles are attached near the rim, designed for heavy-duty lifting and transport. The interior is also visibly rusted, indicating exposure to moisture and possibly corrosive materials. The rim is slightly rolled for added strength, and the overall construction appears sturdy and functional. There are no visible labels, markings, or decorative elements, emphasizing its practical, work-oriented design.
description: A large, weathered metal bucket with rust patches and sturdy side handles, built for heavy-duty use. Its dark, mottled surface and robust construction suggest it is suited for industrial or outdoor environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing one rectangular metal handle and a heavily rusted, darkened surface.
description_view_1: Side view displaying both side handles extending outward and the full cylindrical shape.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the opposite handle visible and rust patterns prominent.
description_view_3: Side view again showing both handles, with the right handle more prominent and surface wear visible.
